title: Oligosporus daghestanicus
taxonomy: Oligosporus daghestanicus is classified in the family Cactaceae, which includes cacti. It is a species of flowering plant native to the Caucasus region. Further classification of Oligosporus daghestanicus includes its order (Caryophyllales), class (Magnoliopsida), and division (Angiospermae). Within the family Cactaceae, Oligosporus daghestanicus is placed in the tribe Gymnocacteae. This specific classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other organisms.
